title: nautilocalyx silvaticus
intro: Nautilocalyx silvaticus, also known as the forest nautilocalyx, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Nautilocalyx silvaticus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Nautilocalyx silvaticus can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
